<style>:root{--ease-base:cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);--ease-spring:cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);--ease-out:cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1);--t-base:0.3s;--t-spring:0.5s;}:root{--bg-primary:#0b0b0b;--bg-secondary:#111111;--bg-card:#141414;--bg-card-hover:#1a1a1a;--color-text-primary:#ffffff;--color-text-secondary:#acabaa;--color-text-muted:#4a4a4a;--color-accent:#e9e0d3;--color-accent-dim:rgba(233,224,211,0.12);--color-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--color-border-strong:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);--font-condensed:"HeliosExt",sans-serif;--font-body:"HeliosExt",sans-serif;--container-max:80rem;--padding-global:5rem;--nav-height:72px;--radius-small:4px;--radius-medium:8px;--radius-large:12px;--radius-rounded:50%;--font-size-h1:clamp(2.5rem,5vw+1rem,4.75rem);--font-size-h2:clamp(2rem,4vw+1rem,3rem);--font-size-h3:clamp(1.75rem,3vw+1rem,2.25rem);--font-size-h4:clamp(1.5rem,2vw+1rem,1.75rem);--font-size-h5:clamp(1.25rem,1vw+1rem,1.5rem);--font-size-h6:clamp(1rem,0.5vw+1rem,1.25rem);--text-size-regular:0.875rem;--text-size-medium:1rem;--text-size-large:1.25rem;--space-0-5:0.125rem;--space-1:0.25rem;--space-1-5:0.375rem;--space-2:0.5rem;--space-2-5:0.625rem;--space-3:0.75rem;--space-3-5:0.875rem;--space-4:1rem;--space-4-5:1.125rem;--space-5:1.25rem;--space-5-5:1.375rem;--space-6:1.5rem;--space-7:1.75rem;--space-8:2rem;--space-9:2.25rem;--space-10:2.5rem;--space-11:2.75rem;--space-12:3rem;--space-13:3.25rem;--space-14:3.5rem;--space-15:3.75rem;--space-16:4rem;--space-18:4.5rem;--space-20:5rem;--space-section-large:clamp(4rem,8vw,7.5rem);--space-section-medium:clamp(3rem,6vw,5rem);--space-section-small:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);--padding-section-small:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);--padding-section-large:clamp(4rem,8vw,7.5rem);--section-pad:clamp(4rem,8vw,7.5rem);--container-pad:5vw;}*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px;}body{background-color:#0b0b0b;color:#ffffff;font-family:"HeliosExt",sans-serif;font-weight:400;line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;}img{max-width:100%;display:block;}a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}ul{list-style:none;}button{border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;font:inherit;}.nav_burger.open .nav_burger-line:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg);}.nav_burger.open .nav_burger-line:nth-child(2){opacity:0;}.nav_burger.open .nav_burger-line:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg);}.hero_float-google{--dur:4.5s;--delay:0s;--rot:-15deg;}.hero_float-instagram{--dur:5s;--delay:0.8s;--rot:8deg;}.hero_float-tiktok{--dur:4s;--delay:1.5s;--rot:25deg;}.hero_float-facebook{--dur:4.2s;--delay:1s;--rot:-12deg;}.stats_metric:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.12s;}.stats_metric:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.24s;}.email-swiper{--swiper-theme-color:#0b0b0b;--swiper-navigation-size:16px;}.email-prev::after,.email-next::after{content:"prev";}.email-prev::after,.email-next::after{font-family:swiper-icons;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;}.email-next::after{content:"next";}.swiper-button-prev::after,.swiper-button-next::after{font-size:14px;font-weight:800;}.capability-card:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.12s;}.capability-card:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.24s;}[data-glow]{--base:37;--spread:20;--radius:8;--border:1.5;--backdrop:rgba(22,22,22,0.4);--size:380;--outer:1;--border-size:calc(1.5 * 1px);--spotlight-size:calc(380 * 1px);--hue:calc(37+(0 * 20));--active-opacity:0;}[data-glow]{position:relative;background-image:radial-gradient( calc(380 * 1px) calc(380 * 1px) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(calc(37+(0 * 20)) 33% 80% / calc(0.08 * 0)),transparent );background-color:rgba(22,22,22,0.4);border:calc(1.5 * 1px) solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);transition:--active-opacity 0.3s ease;}[data-glow]::before,[data-glow]::after{content:"";}[data-glow]::before,[data-glow]::after{pointer-events:none;position:absolute;inset:calc(calc(1.5 * 1px) * -1);border:calc(1.5 * 1px) solid transparent;border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);background-size:calc(100%+(2 * calc(1.5 * 1px))) calc(100%+(2 * calc(1.5 * 1px)));background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:50% 50%;mask:linear-gradient(transparent,transparent),linear-gradient(white,white);mask-clip:padding-box,border-box;mask-composite:intersect;-webkit-mask-composite:destination-in;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s ease;}[data-glow]::before{background-image:radial-gradient( calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.75) calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.75) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(calc(37+(0 * 20)) 33% 70% / 1),transparent 100% );filter:brightness(1.5);}[data-glow]::after{background-image:radial-gradient( calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.5) calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.5) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.6),transparent 100% );}[data-glow] [data-glow]{position:absolute;inset:0;will-change:filter;opacity:1;border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);filter:blur(20px);background:none;pointer-events:none;border:none;}[data-glow]>[data-glow]::before{inset:-10px;border-width:10px;}.js-enabled [gsap-reveal]{opacity:0;}@media (max-width:991px){:root{--padding-global:2rem;--section-pad:4rem;}}@media (max-width:991px){.capability-card:nth-child(3){grid-column:1 / -1;max-width:400px;margin:0 auto;}}@media (max-width:991px){.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (max-width:767px){:root{--padding-global:1.5rem;--section-pad:3.5rem;}}@media (max-width:767px){.capability-card:nth-child(3){grid-column:auto;max-width:100%;}}@media (max-width:767px){.creatives_col:nth-child(3),.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (max-width:479px){:root{--padding-global:5vw;}}@media (max-width:479px){.creatives_col:nth-child(3),.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:0.01ms;animation-iteration-count:1;transition-duration:0.01ms;}}@font-face{font-family:"HeliosExt";src:url("fonts/HeliosExt/heliosext.otf") format("opentype");font-weight:400;font-style:normal;}@font-face{font-family:"HeliosExt";src:url("fonts/HeliosExt/heliosext_italic.ttf") format("truetype");font-weight:400;font-style:italic;}@font-face{font-family:"HeliosExt";src:url("fonts/HeliosExt/heliosext_bold.otf") format("opentype");font-weight:700;font-style:normal;}@font-face{font-family:"HeliosExt";src:url("fonts/HeliosExt/heliosext_bold_italic.ttf") format("truetype");font-weight:700;font-style:italic;}@keyframes floatBob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(var(--rot));}50%{transform:translateY(-14px) rotate(calc(var(--rot)+4deg));}}</style>
